com.irurueta.commons.units

Class DistanceConverter

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.irurueta.commons.units.DistanceConverter

  • public class DistanceConverter
extends Object
    Class to do distance conversions to different units.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static double METERS_PER_CENTIMETER
      Number of meters in 1 centimeter.
      static double METERS_PER_FOOT
      Number of meters in 1 foot.
      static double METERS_PER_INCH
      Number of meters in 1 inch.
      static double METERS_PER_KILOMETER
      Number of meters in 1 kilometer.
      static double METERS_PER_MILE
      Number of meters in 1 mile.
      static double METERS_PER_MILLIMETER
      Number of meters in 1 millimeter.
      static double METERS_PER_YARD
      Number of meters in 1 yard.

      Constructor.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static double centimeterToMeter(double centimeter)
      Converts provided centimeter value to meters.
      static double convert(double input, DistanceUnit inputUnit, DistanceUnit outputUnit)
      Converts a distance value from input unit to provided output unit.
      static double footToMeter(double foot)
      Converts provided foot value to meters.
      static double inchToMeter(double inch)
      Converts provided inch value to meters.
      static double kilometerToMeter(double kilometer)
      Converts provided kilometer value to meters.
      static double meterToCentimeter(double meter)
      Converts provided meter value to centimeters.
      static double meterToFoot(double meter)
      Converts provided meter value to feet.

      Converts provided meter value to inches.
      static double meterToKilometer(double meter)
      Converts provided meter value to kilometers.
      static double meterToMile(double meter)
      Converts provided meter value to miles.

      Converts provided meter value to milimeters.
      static double meterToYard(double meter)
      Converts provided meter value to yards.
      static double mileToMeter(double mile)
      Converts provided mile value to meters.
      static double millimeterToMeter(double millimeter)
      Converts provided milimeter value to meters.
      static double yardToMeter(double yard)
      Converts provided yard value to meters.

    • Method Detail

      • convert

        public static double convert(double input,
                             DistanceUnit inputUnit,
                             DistanceUnit outputUnit)
        Converts a distance value from input unit to provided output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - distance value.
        inputUnit - input distance unit.
        outputUnit - output distance unit.
        Returns:
        converted distance value.

      • meterToMillimeter

        public static double meterToMillimeter(double meter)
        Converts provided meter value to milimeters.
        Parameters:
        meter - meter value.
        Returns:
        same distance converted to milimeters.

      • millimeterToMeter

        public static double millimeterToMeter(double millimeter)
        Converts provided milimeter value to meters.
        Parameters:
        millimeter - milimeter value.
        Returns:
        same distance conterted to meters.

      • meterToCentimeter

        public static double meterToCentimeter(double meter)
        Converts provided meter value to centimeters.
        Parameters:
        meter - meter value.
        Returns:
        same distance converted to centimeters.

        Returns:

        Returns:
